fallback_grant_state_check.name: fallback_grant_state_check
fallback_grant_state_check.value:
("admin_fallback_grant"."status" = 'active' AND "admin_fallback_grant"."revoked_at" IS NULL AND "admin_fallback_grant"."revoked_by" IS NULL AND "admin_fallback_grant"."revoke_request_id" IS NULL AND "admin_fallback_grant"."revoke_request_hash" IS NULL)
        OR ("admin_fallback_grant"."status" = 'revoked' AND "admin_fallback_grant"."revoked_at" IS NOT NULL AND "admin_fallback_grant"."revoked_by" IS NOT NULL AND "admin_fallback_grant"."revoke_request_id" IS NOT NULL AND "admin_fallback_grant"."revoke_request_hash" IS NOT NULL)

fallback_reservation_actual_check.name: fallback_reservation_actual_check
fallback_reservation_actual_check.value: ("admin_fallback_reservation"."actual_tokens" IS NULL AND "admin_fallback_reservation"."actual_paise" IS NULL) OR ("admin_fallback_reservation"."actual_tokens" BETWEEN 0 AND "admin_fallback_reservation"."reserved_tokens" AND "admin_fallback_reservation"."actual_paise" BETWEEN 0 AND "admin_fallback_reservation"."reserved_paise")

fallback_reservation_state_check.name: fallback_reservation_state_check
fallback_reservation_state_check.value: ("admin_fallback_reservation"."status" = 'reserved' AND "admin_fallback_reservation"."actual_tokens" IS NULL AND "admin_fallback_reservation"."actual_paise" IS NULL AND "admin_fallback_reservation"."reconciled_at" IS NULL) OR ("admin_fallback_reservation"."status" = 'reconciled' AND "admin_fallback_reservation"."actual_tokens" IS NOT NULL AND "admin_fallback_reservation"."actual_paise" IS NOT NULL AND "admin_fallback_reservation"."reconciled_at" IS NOT NULL)

appeal_target_check.name: appeal_target_check
appeal_target_check.value: (CASE WHEN "appeal"."attempt_id" IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END + CASE WHEN "appeal"."project_review_id" IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) = 1

assessment_mastery_projection_repair_app.name: assessment_mastery_projection_repair_applied_state
assessment_mastery_projection_repair_app.value: ("assessment_mastery_projection_repair"."status" <> 'applied') OR ("assessment_mastery_projection_repair"."applied_at" IS NOT NULL AND "assessment_mastery_projection_repair"."resolution_code" IS NOT NULL)

career_card_publish_shape.name: career_card_publish_shape
career_card_publish_shape.value: ("career_card"."status" <> 'published') OR ("career_card"."published_by" IS NOT NULL AND "career_card"."published_at" IS NOT NULL AND "career_card"."retired_at" IS NULL)

career_card_market_all_or_none.name: career_card_market_all_or_none
career_card_market_all_or_none.value:
("career_card"."market_claim" IS NULL AND "career_card"."market_source_url" IS NULL AND "career_card"."market_region" IS NULL
          AND "career_card"."market_observed_at" IS NULL AND "career_card"."market_reviewed_at" IS NULL
          AND "career_card"."market_expires_at" IS NULL AND "career_card"."market_reviewed_by" IS NULL)
        OR ("career_card"."market_claim" IS NOT NULL AND "career_card"."market_source_url" IS NOT NULL AND "career_card"."market_region" IS NOT NULL
          AND "career_card"."market_observed_at" IS NOT NULL AND "career_card"."market_reviewed_at" IS NOT NULL
          AND "career_card"."market_expires_at" IS NOT NULL AND "career_card"."market_reviewed_by" IS NOT NULL)

career_card_market_metadata_check.name: career_card_market_metadata_check
career_card_market_metadata_check.value:
"career_card"."market_claim" IS NULL OR (
        char_length("career_card"."market_claim") BETWEEN 10 AND 1000
        AND char_length("career_card"."market_region") BETWEEN 2 AND 120
        AND char_length("career_card"."market_source_url") BETWEEN 12 AND 2000
        AND "career_card"."market_source_url" ~ '^https://[^[:space:]]+$'
        AND "career_card"."market_observed_at" <= "career_card"."market_reviewed_at"
        AND "career_card"."market_reviewed_at" < "career_card"."market_expires_at"
      )

community_post_deletion_shape.name: community_post_deletion_shape
community_post_deletion_shape.value: ("community_post"."state" <> 'deleted' AND "community_post"."deleted_at" IS NULL) OR ("community_post"."state" = 'deleted' AND "community_post"."deleted_at" IS NOT NULL)

community_post_moderation_shape.name: community_post_moderation_shape
community_post_moderation_shape.value: ("community_post"."moderated_by_user_id" IS NULL AND "community_post"."moderation_reason" IS NULL) OR ("community_post"."moderated_by_user_id" IS NOT NULL AND char_length("community_post"."moderation_reason") BETWEEN 8 AND 1000)

community_reply_deletion_shape.name: community_reply_deletion_shape
community_reply_deletion_shape.value: ("community_reply"."state" <> 'deleted' AND "community_reply"."deleted_at" IS NULL) OR ("community_reply"."state" = 'deleted' AND "community_reply"."deleted_at" IS NOT NULL)

community_reply_moderation_shape.name: community_reply_moderation_shape
community_reply_moderation_shape.value: ("community_reply"."moderated_by_user_id" IS NULL AND "community_reply"."moderation_reason" IS NULL) OR ("community_reply"."moderated_by_user_id" IS NOT NULL AND char_length("community_reply"."moderation_reason") BETWEEN 8 AND 1000)

community_report_details_length.name: community_report_details_length
community_report_details_length.value: "community_report"."details" IS NULL OR char_length("community_report"."details") BETWEEN 4 AND 1000

community_report_decision_shape.name: community_report_decision_shape
community_report_decision_shape.value:
("community_report"."status" = 'open' AND "community_report"."decided_by_user_id" IS NULL AND "community_report"."decision_reason" IS NULL AND "community_report"."decided_at" IS NULL)
        OR ("community_report"."status" <> 'open' AND "community_report"."decided_by_user_id" IS NOT NULL AND char_length("community_report"."decision_reason") BETWEEN 8 AND 1000 AND "community_report"."decided_at" IS NOT NULL)

daily_review_item_answer_shape_check.name: daily_review_item_answer_shape_check
daily_review_item_answer_shape_check.value:
("daily_review_item"."status" = 'pending' AND "daily_review_item"."score" IS NULL AND "daily_review_item"."passed" IS NULL AND "daily_review_item"."answered_at" IS NULL)
        OR ("daily_review_item"."status" = 'answered' AND "daily_review_item"."attempt_id" IS NOT NULL AND "daily_review_item"."score" IS NOT NULL AND "daily_review_item"."passed" IS NOT NULL AND "daily_review_item"."answered_at" IS NOT NULL)

daily_review_session_state_shape_check.name: daily_review_session_state_shape_check
daily_review_session_state_shape_check.value:
("daily_review_session"."status" = 'unavailable' AND "daily_review_session"."question_count" = 0 AND "daily_review_session"."completed_count" = 0 AND "daily_review_session"."completed_at" IS NULL)
        OR ("daily_review_session"."status" = 'ready' AND "daily_review_session"."question_count" = 5 AND "daily_review_session"."completed_count" BETWEEN 0 AND 4 AND "daily_review_session"."completed_at" IS NULL)
        OR ("daily_review_session"."status" = 'completed' AND "daily_review_session"."question_count" = 5 AND "daily_review_session"."completed_count" = 5 AND "daily_review_session"."completed_at" IS NOT NULL)

learner_draft_language_length.name: learner_draft_language_length
learner_draft_language_length.value: "learner_draft"."language" IS NULL OR char_length("learner_draft"."language") BETWEEN 1 AND 40

learner_draft_kind_language_check.name: learner_draft_kind_language_check
learner_draft_kind_language_check.value: ("learner_draft"."kind" = 'lesson' AND "learner_draft"."language" IS NULL) OR ("learner_draft"."kind" = 'code' AND "learner_draft"."language" IS NOT NULL)

module_project_template_review_shape.name: module_project_template_review_shape
module_project_template_review_shape.value:
("module_project_template"."stage" = 'draft' AND "module_project_template"."reviewed_by_user_id" IS NULL AND "module_project_template"."reviewed_at" IS NULL AND "module_project_template"."published_at" IS NULL AND "module_project_template"."retired_at" IS NULL)
        OR ("module_project_template"."stage" IN ('beta','verified') AND "module_project_template"."reviewed_by_user_id" IS NOT NULL AND "module_project_template"."reviewed_at" IS NOT NULL AND "module_project_template"."published_at" IS NOT NULL AND "module_project_template"."retired_at" IS NULL)
        OR ("module_project_template"."stage" = 'retired' AND "module_project_template"."reviewed_by_user_id" IS NOT NULL AND "module_project_template"."reviewed_at" IS NOT NULL AND "module_project_template"."retired_at" IS NOT NULL)

project_assignment_shape.name: project_assignment_shape
project_assignment_shape.value:
("project"."assignment_template_id" IS NULL AND "project"."assignment_content_hash" IS NULL AND "project"."assignment_stage_at_start" IS NULL AND "project"."assignment_provenance" IS NULL)
        OR ("project"."assignment_template_id" IS NOT NULL AND "project"."assignment_content_hash" ~ '^[0-9a-f]{64}$' AND "project"."assignment_stage_at_start" IN ('beta','verified') AND jsonb_typeof("project"."assignment_provenance") = 'object')

project_review_correction_completed_shap.name: project_review_correction_completed_shape
project_review_correction_completed_shap.value:
("project_review_correction"."status" <> 'succeeded') OR (
        "project_review_correction"."result_findings" IS NOT NULL
        AND "project_review_correction"."result_findings_hash" IS NOT NULL
        AND "project_review_correction"."result_provenance" IS NOT NULL
        AND "project_review_correction"."evidence" IS NOT NULL
        AND "project_review_correction"."evidence_hash" IS NOT NULL
        AND "project_review_correction"."projection_applied" IS NOT NULL
        AND "project_review_correction"."completed_at" IS NOT NULL
      )

provider_operation_receipt_response_shap.name: provider_operation_receipt_response_shape
provider_operation_receipt_response_shap.value:
("provider_operation_receipt"."status" = 'processing' AND "provider_operation_receipt"."response_status" IS NULL AND "provider_operation_receipt"."response_body" IS NULL AND "provider_operation_receipt"."completed_at" IS NULL)
        OR ("provider_operation_receipt"."status" = 'completed' AND "provider_operation_receipt"."response_status" IS NOT NULL AND "provider_operation_receipt"."response_body" IS NOT NULL AND jsonb_typeof("provider_operation_receipt"."response_body") = 'object' AND "provider_operation_receipt"."completed_at" IS NOT NULL)

public_portfolio_about_length.name: public_portfolio_about_length
public_portfolio_about_length.value: "public_portfolio"."about" IS NULL OR char_length("public_portfolio"."about") BETWEEN 1 AND 1200

public_portfolio_publish_shape.name: public_portfolio_publish_shape
public_portfolio_publish_shape.value: NOT "public_portfolio"."is_published" OR ("public_portfolio"."published_at" IS NOT NULL AND "public_portfolio"."withdrawn_at" IS NULL)

reward_ledger_evidence_shape_check.name: reward_ledger_evidence_shape_check
reward_ledger_evidence_shape_check.value: ("reward_ledger"."attempt_id" IS NOT NULL)::int + ("reward_ledger"."mastery_evidence_id" IS NOT NULL)::int = 1

reward_ledger_event_shape_check.name: reward_ledger_event_shape_check
reward_ledger_event_shape_check.value:
("reward_ledger"."event_kind" = 'grant' AND "reward_ledger"."source_event_id" IS NULL AND "reward_ledger"."xp_delta" > 0)
        OR ("reward_ledger"."event_kind" = 'revocation' AND "reward_ledger"."source_event_id" IS NOT NULL AND "reward_ledger"."xp_delta" < 0)

reward_reconciliation_job_evidence_shape.name: reward_reconciliation_job_evidence_shape_check
reward_reconciliation_job_evidence_shape.value: ("reward_reconciliation_job"."attempt_id" IS NOT NULL)::int + ("reward_reconciliation_job"."mastery_evidence_id" IS NOT NULL)::int = 1

reward_reconciliation_job_operation_shap.name: reward_reconciliation_job_operation_shape_check
reward_reconciliation_job_operation_shap.value:
("reward_reconciliation_job"."operation" = 'reconcile_attempt' AND "reward_reconciliation_job"."attempt_id" IS NOT NULL)
        OR ("reward_reconciliation_job"."operation" = 'reconcile_mastery' AND "reward_reconciliation_job"."mastery_evidence_id" IS NOT NULL)

reward_reconciliation_job_lease_shape_ch.name: reward_reconciliation_job_lease_shape_check
reward_reconciliation_job_lease_shape_ch.value:
("reward_reconciliation_job"."status" = 'running' AND "reward_reconciliation_job"."lease_token" IS NOT NULL AND "reward_reconciliation_job"."lease_expires_at" IS NOT NULL)
        OR ("reward_reconciliation_job"."status" <> 'running' AND "reward_reconciliation_job"."lease_token" IS NULL AND "reward_reconciliation_job"."lease_expires_at" IS NULL)

runner_job_recovery_snapshot_check.name: runner_job_recovery_snapshot_check
runner_job_recovery_snapshot_check.value:
"runner_job"."recovery_state" is null or "runner_job"."dispatch_request" is not null or (
        "runner_job"."recovery_state" = 'quarantined'
        and "runner_job"."recovery_last_error_code" = 'PRACTICE_LEGACY_DISPATCH_SNAPSHOT_MISSING'
      )

session_revocation_request_channel_check.name: session_revocation_request_channel_check
session_revocation_request_channel_check.value: ("session_revocation_request"."request_channel" = 'authenticated' AND "session_revocation_request"."proof_request_id" IS NULL) OR ("session_revocation_request"."request_channel" = 'email_proof' AND "session_revocation_request"."proof_request_id" IS NOT NULL AND "session_revocation_request"."identity_verified_at" IS NOT NULL)
